title: Clear Orders Protocol
summary: Issuing unambiguous commands that crew can execute immediately.
details: Orders must be: clear (no ambiguity), brief (combat time is precious), and complete (contains necessary information). Good order: 'Pilot, evasive pattern delta, now.' Bad order: 'Try to avoid getting hit.' Confirm receipt of orders. Allow crew initiative within ordered parameters. In emergency, single-word commands may be necessary - establish these in advance.
annotations: Practice standard commands until they're automatic.
